tasks.check: deno task check:core && deno task check:init
tasks.coverage:collect: deno task --config packages/core/deno.json test:unit:coverage && deno task --config packages/core/deno.json test:integration:coverage && deno task --config packages/init/deno.json test:coverage
tasks.coverage: deno task coverage:collect && deno task coverage:report
tasks.coverage:report: sh -c 'inputs=""; for dir in .coverage/core/unit .coverage/core/integration .coverage/init/unit; do if [ -d "$dir" ]; then inputs="$inputs $dir"; fi; done; if [ -z "$inputs" ]; then echo "No coverage data found"; exit 1; fi; deno coverage $inputs'
tasks.coverage:detailed: sh -c 'inputs=""; for dir in .coverage/core/unit .coverage/core/integration .coverage/init/unit; do if [ -d "$dir" ]; then inputs="$inputs $dir"; fi; done; if [ -z "$inputs" ]; then echo "No coverage data found"; exit 1; fi; deno coverage $inputs --detailed'
tasks.coverage:lcov: sh -c 'inputs=""; for dir in .coverage/core/unit .coverage/core/integration .coverage/init/unit; do if [ -d "$dir" ]; then inputs="$inputs $dir"; fi; done; if [ -z "$inputs" ]; then echo "No coverage data found"; exit 1; fi; deno coverage $inputs --lcov --output=.coverage/lcov.info'
tasks.coverage:html: sh -c 'inputs=""; for dir in .coverage/core/unit .coverage/core/integration .coverage/init/unit; do if [ -d "$dir" ]; then inputs="$inputs $dir"; fi; done; if [ -z "$inputs" ]; then echo "No coverage data found"; exit 1; fi; deno coverage $inputs --html --output=.coverage/html'
